title: IPv6 and Modern Programmable Networks · Operations Brief: Net Infrastructure Code
summary: Extend the branch design for IPv6, centralized policy, overlays, zero trust, SASE, and infrastructure as code. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net infrastructure code increment in a dual-stack and programmable-network transition plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Manage network templates, playbooks, inventories, source control, review, conflict, drift, upgrade, and rollback evidence.
Relate zero-trust policy decisions, least privilege, continuous context, SASE, and SSE service boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
